Implementation of the XOR cipher

array_types.name: Byte_List
array_types.code: type Byte_List is array (Positive range <>) of Byte_Value;

subprograms.name: Crypt
subprograms.code: function Crypt (Text : in Byte_List; Key : in Byte_List) return Byte_List

documentation.description:
If Text is plaintext, encrypts Text with Key
If Text is ciphertext encrypted with Key, decrypts Text
Crypt (Crypt (T, K), K) = Text

subprograms.name: Crypt
subprograms.code: procedure Crypt (Input_Name : in String; Output_Name : in String; Key : in Byte_List)

documentation.description:
Opens Input_Name and creates Output_Name
Encrypts the contents of Input_Name into Output_Name
Any exceptions opening or creating the files are propagated to the caller

subprograms.name: To_Bytes
subprograms.code: function To_Bytes (Source : in String) return Byte_List

documentation.description: Help function for using a string as a key
